title: Same duplicates, different goal
narration: This time we want the last 2, not the first one.
callout: The goal changed, so one movement rule changes too.

title: Save it and search right
narration: We save answer = 2, then move left to mid + 1 because a later copy could still be on the right.
decision: Found target, save answer and move left to 3.

title: The last copy wins
narration: We later find index 3 and save it. When the search ends, that is the last occurrence.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: What is the only big difference between first occurrence and last occurrence?
